rows.notes: P69 runs only after H65 lands the terminal archive-first freeze packet.
P69 extends the preserved P54 hygiene posture rather than reopening science.
P69 should run from the repo-local hygiene worktree rather than dirty root main.
The branch/worktree registry should expose the current hygiene branch, live published branch, and root quarantine.
The keep-set doc should record the current topology and quarantine facts explicitly.
The preserved clean descendants and active published branch should all remain clean.
Dirty root main should remain parked on a quarantine branch.
The current published branch should remain a one-sided 18-commit successor above p56.
The published clean descendant should remain far enough ahead of origin/main that dirty-root integration stays inadmissible.
The live published branch should remain pushed and tracked at origin.
